sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32737" key="e)kpote/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκποτέον</orth>, <sense id="n32737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must drink to the dregs,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὴν τρύγα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:249" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">249</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
